sections.paragraph:
Original: לויתן

Transliteration: livyâthân

Phonetic: liv-yaw-thawn'

BDB Definition:

  1. leviathan, sea monster, dragon
    1. large aquatic animal
    2. perhaps the extinct dinosaur, plesiosaurus, exact meaning unknown

Origin: from H3867

TWOT entry: 1089b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
